Title: The Untold Story of the Birth of the iPhone
Description:
Apple turns 50 on April 1.
In his new book, “Apple: The First 50 Years,” David Pogue chronicles the secrecy-laden environment in which Steve Jobs willed the first iPhone into existence.

Title: The candy heir vs. chocolate skimpflation
